sentences.text: You have to reach the southwest management please know your call is very important to us due to the coronavirus our office is closed. If you are a current resident and having maintenance emergency please press one for business hours location and rental information press two now for non, emergency or for Melissa press three for John press four for Rubin press five for Maria press six for a. New person at extension one. One four is unavailable. Please leave your message. After the tone when done hang up or press the pound key.

Or or. Hi, Reuben, my name is Mitch. I'm with rental shot you over an email earlier it looks like you saw the reason I was giving you a call.
